inline_comments.message: maxNumberofUEs should be maxNumberOfUEs, based on the conventions we followed so far. @Chandra or @Bill, let me know if I am incorrect here?

Hi Harish and all,
  We use maxNumberofUEs is because we refer 3GPP original definition directly(all the of in the middle is "of"), since the AAI convention is "Of", we can change all the attributes with "of" in the middle into "Of", please review patch set 2.

Convention that we follow is the java-attribute value we use the camelCase and for the name value we use kebab-case.

If for example, if we have name in-maint (kebab-case) then we will have java-attribute inMaint, we will not have the java-attribute iNMaint

Your kebab-case and camelCase are not matching up and will potentially cause issues with the code.

java-attribute is not exposed to the client so you need to follow the convention that was set.

If you have name as dl-thpt-per-slice the equivalent java-attribute would be dlThptPerSlice.

I see other properties in the same file where they are not matching please fix them:

dLThptPerUE
uLThptPerSlice
cSAvailabilityTarget
maxNumberOfPDUSession
cSReliabilityMeanTime

Hi Harish,
 Thank you for your interpretation. These words have specific meanings in communication system, not just abbreviation, they come together to represent an item or make sense. This is appilied or meaningful for all the systems who doing slicing service, not only ONAP. cS should be CS actually, but following the camelCase I think the first letter should also be lower case. Anyway, if following the convention, it is OK to change 
 dLThptPerUE uLThptPerSlice cSAvailabilityTarget and cSReliabilityMeanTime into
 dlThptPerUE ulThptPerSlice csAvailabilityTarget and csReliabilityMeanTime, but maxNumberOfPDUSession should remain the same at least.
I thought we were going to use a generic profile node with profile.characteristics property holding all the values (name-value pairs as json string).

Hi Chandra,
  Profiles have differernt functionalities and at different levels, a generic node can't satisfy and enable the requirements and usage. If it can be a generic one, we'd also like too, however it can't. Please carry these changes.
